title: LumysPlate
description:
This Minecraft mod introduces the combine of Elytras and Chestplates.
The Enhanced Elytras maintain the base armor rating and durability
body:
**Combine Elytras and Chestplates to gain more Accessibility**

Enhanced Elytra: Retaining the original armor rating, the combined elytras receive a durability boost equivalent to a netherite chestplate. They also include gliding functionality for uninterrupted mobility and exploration.

Accessibility: Items are fully equippable, swappable, and compatible with dispensers for convenient access.
